sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87582" key="proi/+ssomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προΐσσομαι</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">προίξ</etym>) <sense id="n87582.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ask a gift, beg,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0232.tlg001:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">130</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προΐκτης.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
